description: GET /lambdas/parcels/{x}/{y}/operators on a valid-but-unowned coordinate returns 404 with a quirky body shape: error key is 'Bad Request' (capital R!) NOT 'Not Found' - this is the lamb2 historical quirk preserved by parcel_or_estate_not_found().

body_json.message: Parcel or estate rights not found for x: 0, y: 0

captured_from: hand-authored from handler source (lambdas_land.rs::parcel_or_estate_not_found) - status is 404 but the body says 'Bad Request' for parity
